name: cinemaflow
description: CinemaFlow - Movie website with NestJS backend and React frontend

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend

author: Your Name
